title: Smoky Flaky Thai Grilled Cherries Khanom Krok
description: A sweet and savory fusion of Thai and Western flavors, featuring grilled cherries in a flaky khanom krok crust.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, graham cracker crumbs, smoked paprika, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Add melted butter and stir until mixture forms a crumbly dough.
Gradually add heavy cream and mix until dough comes together in a ball.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out rounds of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of cherry jam in the center of each round.
Brush edges with a little water and fold dough over filling to form a triangle.
Press edges to seal and use a fork to crimp.
Grill khanom krok for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream and a sprinkle of lime zest.
